review_comment: why need to remove? This will increase the testing time quite a bit, no?
Last time I checked, the tests were conflicting with each other because of the disk use. Let me check if that is still the case.

So there is a global variable in head.go which is causing a race. We could get rid of that global, but we would need to store a pointer with every memSeries. That would be around 7.6KiB per million series. I guess the tradeoff looks fine (tradeoff with having a global variable).
